zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Hughes III於大約1292年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾曼諾時，他的父親Henry Hughes II28歲，母親Isabel Moores20歲。他和Katherine FitzAlan至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1349年7月21日在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Hughes III于大约1292年出生在英国英格兰越可爾曼諾时，他的父亲Henry Hughes II28岁，母亲Isabel Moores20岁。他和Katherine FitzAlan至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1349年7月21日在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Hughes III was born about 1292, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Hughes II, was 28 and his mother, Isabel Moores, was 20. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Katherine FitzAlan. He died on 21 July 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Hughes III est né environ 1292, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Hughes II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel Moores, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Katherine FitzAlan. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Hughes III um 1292 in Manor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Hughes II 28 und seine Mutter Isabel Moores 20. Er hatte mit Katherine FitzAlan mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1349 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hughes III è nato il circa 1292 nel Manor, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Hughes II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Moores, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Katherine FitzAlan. Morì il 21 luglio 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Hughes IIIが約1292年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父Henry Hughes IIは28歳，母Isabel Mooresは20歳であった。彼はKatherine FitzAlanとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年7月21日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Hughes III(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Hughes II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Moores(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Katherine FitzAlan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 7월 21일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hughes III nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Hughes II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Moores, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Katherine FitzAlan. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Hughes III родился около 1292 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Hughes II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Moores, 20. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Katherine FitzAlan. Он умер 21 июля 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Hughes III nació aproximadamente 1292, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Hughes II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabel Moores, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Katherine FitzAlan. Murió el 21 de julio de 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
